hero.subtagline: By building automation that runs quietly in the background —
hero.description: so your team can focus on what actually matters.

items.name: Quick Win
items.description: Single-purpose automation you can deploy today. Ideal for reports, notifications, and form handling.
items.examples: Daily reports · Form auto-reply · Sheet triggers

items.name: Workflow Build
items.description: End-to-end processes that connect multiple tools. Designed with error handling and audit trails.
items.examples: Invoice generation · Multi-channel alerts · API integrations

items.name: AI Integration
items.description: Claude AI + workflow automation. Lead triage, content classification, smart routing.
items.examples: Lead triage · Smart summaries · AI-assisted operations

about.heading: About
about.body: I'm an automation engineer focused on practical, production-ready solutions. My code ships with error handling, logging, and fallback paths — the kind of things that matter at 3 AM when a workflow fails. I work across Google Apps Script, n8n, and Dify — and I'll help you pick the right one for your requirement, not just build with whatever's familiar. Fluent in English and Japanese, with a focus on the Google Workspace ecosystem combined with modern AI tools like Claude.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.body: Available for freelance projects on Upwork. Bilingual support for international and Japanese teams.
